name: @foundation/claude-multiacct
description: claude-multiacct runtime product: single-app OAuth account pool for running multiple Anthropic accounts in one Claude Desktop install. Scaffold only in this PR — no product logic yet.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:shim && pnpm run build:watcher && pnpm run build:daemon && pnpm run build:active-token && pnpm run build:launcher && pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run build:cli
